resources.string: A local account record is present. Identifiers and profile content are hidden.
No active local account record is available.
Session is missing; sign in again
Session storage is unreadable; sign in again
Secure storage was reset; sign in again
Disconnect and delete local account data
Deletes credentials, provider caches, queues, mappings, pending work, extension state and controllable local exports. It does not modify the remote list.
Uses the same complete local purge, returns to provider selection and never copies data between providers.
Removes only the locally stored consent record. A future MyAnimeList sign-in requires consent again.
Appearance, language, accessibility, storage and update preferences remain in the shared Kizomi settings hierarchy and are not provider-specific.
The local account operation could not be completed. No alternate provider was contacted.
The local account state could not be read safely.
Delete local data and change provider?

The current account is disconnected. Credentials, account-bound caches, queues, mappings, pending work, calendar-extension state, controllable image cache entries and local exports are deleted. Nothing is copied to another provider and no remote list entry is changed.
